raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The proposed legislation aims to lower gasoline costs for California commuters.",
    "The legislation seeks to increase crude oil and fuel capacity to reduce the likelihood of sudden price hikes at the pump.",
    "This legislation is part of a broader effort to prevent unpredictable gasoline price spikes.",
    "Gasoline prices have fluctuated dramatically over recent years, creating significant financial uncertainty for Inland Empire workers.",
    "The legislation aims to stabilize gasoline prices and prevent sudden increases that disproportionately affect lower- and middle-income households."
  ]
}
```
